text:
Prediction: No

The current visit record does not provide any explicit evidence of a lipid disorder such as hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, or any other specific lipid metabolism disorder. While the patient has several cardiovascular conditions and diabetes, which are risk factors for lipid disorders, these alone do not indicate that a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the next hospital visit. There is no mention of any lipid levels being assessed, no diagnosis of a lipid disorder, and no ongoing management or treatment specifically targeting lipid metabolism issues. Therefore, based on the information provided, I predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will not be diagnosed in the next visit.
